result.stdout:
the CLI v1.0.0

USAGE
  the [options]
  the [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  init              initializes the application 
  report            gets the time entries for a specified date range Subcommands: report today, report yesterday.
  sync              synchronizes the time entries for a specific date range to Personio Subcommands: sync month current, sync month last, sync today, sync yesterday.

You can run `the [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

the CLI v1.0.0

USAGE
  the report <Date> [options]
  the report [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  gets the time entries for a specified date range

PARAMETERS
  Date              

OPTIONS
  -f|--from         From 
  -t|--to           To 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  today             gets the time entries for a today 
  yesterday         gets the time entries for yesterday 

You can run `the report [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
the CLI v1.0.0

USAGE
  the sync <Date> [options]
  the sync [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  synchronizes the time entries for a specific date range to Personio

PARAMETERS
  Date              

OPTIONS
  -f|--from         From 
  -t|--to           To 
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  month current     synchronizes the time entries for the current month to Personio 
  month last        synchronizes the time entries for the last month to Personio 
  today             synchronizes the time entries for today to Personio 
  yesterday         synchronizes the time entries for yesterday to Personio 

You can run `the sync [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.
